sourceOverview.notes: Wafer-scale inference. Extremely fast. Hosts Llama. No audio.

activeModelsSummary.llm: Fast hosted LLM catalog [dynamic] — Examples change quickly; voice examples use external speech providers

audit.priceRangeSummary: Cerebras emphasizes ultra-fast LLM inference; pricing depends on model/plan.
audit.limitsSummary: Official public docs reviewed did not show first-party native TTS/STT; voice examples pair Cerebras with third-party speech components.
audit.regionSummary: Cerebras cloud; public region granularity limited.
audit.freeTierSummary: Yes: 'free to get started' style access has been promoted.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Treat Cerebras as an LLM compute/inference provider, not a native speech provider.

supplementalResearch.title: 29. Cerebras (US) — LLM ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 29. Cerebras (US) — LLM ✓

**Status:** Active. **Fastest inference** (2,264 t/s on Llama 8B). Wafer-Scale Engine-3. OpenAI-compatible at `https://api.cerebras.ai/v1`.

Free tier: all models, 8,192 token context. Developer: from $10. Models: `llama-3.1-8b` ($0.10/MTok), `gpt-oss-120b` ($0.45/MTok), `glm-4.7`. No TTS/STT.
